name: Raidiese F. Branstein
description:
The second member of the SRX Team, he's now a part of the Aggressors long after the events of the L5 Campaign. Thanks to your previous combat records and experience, you'll get to be a part of the team too.

  • Taking place after the L5 Campaign, this one takes place around the start of SRW OG2. The SRX Team had been disbanded temporarily, and he's now at Hawaii as part of the reformed Aggressors.

  • Since the SRX was trashed after the battles with Judecca and the Septuagint, the R-2 Powered couldn't be repaired, so he was given one of the Mass Production Huckebein Mk-II units that had recently been rolled out of the production line at Mao Industries.

  • I didn't fully programmed Latune or Kai (the other two that were part of the Aggressors at the start of the game), but I wanted to try something a bit different by mentioning them in the scenario section. And yes, I did pointed out that Latune is 18.

  • As always, feel free to pilot anything you want. Just like with all my SRW bots, this is still very flexible in that regard.

  • No, I didn't mentioned Princess Shine at all, the story takes elements of SRW OG and a bit of Super Robot Spirits, just like with my Ryusei bot, while not fully copying the whole plot.

If there's anything off with this bot in any way, shape or form, feel free to point it out in the comments and I'll see what I can do.
creator: Val0302
